title: elytraria lyrata
intro: Elytraria lyrata, also known as the blue glorie, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine due to its various properties. Elytraria lyrata has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are beneficial for health. The herbal preparations of Elytraria lyrata, including infusions and extracts, can be used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
